name: Deferred - Old Wound - 1
description: First returns for old wounds and lingering hurts.

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] An old wound from {origin} announced that healing had not meant ending.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] The hurt you had taken in {origin} returned in pain, weakness, or memory sharp enough to count as both.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer old-wound 2 1d6] A wound from {origin} reminded you that the body keeps its own records.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] What had seemed mended since {origin} proved only quiet for a time.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] The scar or strain from {origin} returned when work, weather, or fear pressed the right place.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer old-wound 2 1d6] A hurt first taken in {origin} made itself known again at an unkindly useful moment.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] An old injury from {origin} had more patience than you did.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] The body remembered {origin} even when your daily life had nearly forgotten it.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer old-wound 2 1d6] Pain from {origin} returned in warning before it returned in force.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] A bodily lesson from {origin} proved not yet fully learned.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] What {sourceTitle} had done to your body in {origin} resurfaced when endurance mattered.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer old-wound 2 1d6] The old wound from {origin} returned not alone, but with memory close behind it.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] A mark from {origin} had never truly stopped shaping what you dared with your body.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] The body-debt from {origin} came due again in stiffness, ache, or hesitation.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer old-wound 2 1d6] An injury from {origin} reminded you that survival and wholeness are different bargains.
results.name: old-wound-1

results.description: [defer old-wound 2 1d6] The old wound from {origin} had simply been waiting for the right season to speak again.
